tools.name: attendeesSignins.getSignins
tools.description: Returns a list of signin objects sorted by signin ID descending.

tools.name: attendeesSignins.getSigninSigninId
tools.description: Retrieve the information associated with a signin record

tools.name: authentication.postLogin
tools.description: Submit your email and password to get an API token

tools.name: authentication.postLogout
tools.description: Log out by deleting your token off the server.

tools.name: passwords.postChangePassword
tools.description: Pass in your old password and your new password

tools.name: passwords.postRequestPasswordReset
tools.description: The admin should run this on behalf of a user who forgot their password.  The API will generate a password reset code which the admin should then provide to the user. The user can use their client to reset their password. Normally the password reset code is mailed to the user, but I didn't want to do this in this case because I didn't want to  introduce the complicated dependency of having an SMTP server just for this purpose. Doing it this way makes it easy for people to adopt this  API.

tools.name: passwords.postVerifyPasswordChange
tools.description: Another endpoint will generate a password reset code for you. You should  use the client app to submit the reset code along with the new password to change your password.

tools.name: teamMembers.deleteUserUserId
tools.description: To preserve referential integrity in the database, the user account  will not be deleted from the database. Rather, the password will be set to the empty string, effectively preventing that user from logging in. Furthermore, all active sessions for that user will be deleted, as will any password reset tokens.

tools.name: teamMembers.getUsers
tools.description: Retrieve the information associated with all team members' user records

tools.name: teamMembers.getUserUserId
tools.description: Retrieve the information associated with a user's account

tools.name: teamMembers.postUser
tools.description: Use this endpoint to create a team member (user) record

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
